text: _30A BLADR_ACDNT_ADMSN_CD (30a) Bladder Frequency of Accidents: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the frequency of bladder accidents at admission. Bladder accidents refers to the act of wetting linen or clothing with urine, and includes bedpan and urinal spills. 01 = Five or more accidents in the past 7 days, 02 = Four accidents in the past 7 days, 03 = Three accidents in the past 7 days, 04 = Two accidents in the past 7 days, 05 = One accident in the past 7 days, 06 = No accidents, uses
